title: 2 Pcs Y-Shaped Swivel Potato Peeler, Stainless Steel Vegetable Fruit Peeler for Kitchen
features: 【Material】The apple peeler is made of stainless steel, which is durable.
【Package】You will get 2 pieces assorted prep peelers in black & green, the size is 5.7x3 inch, handle thickness is 0.5 inch.
【Design】Comfortable Y-peeler shape is easy to operate and works with every grip.
【Features】The stainless steel peelers for kitchen is easy to clean, just rinse with water.
【Applications】Vegetable peeler for cucumber peels, carrots, potatoes, apples and all other vegetables.
description: Product Description About This Item: 1. It is an essential tool for kitchen peeling. 2. The peeler saves time and labor, durable and easy to use. 3. Helps you easily peel strips of carrots, cucumber, courgette and more. Product Detail - Y Shaped Swivel Potato Peeler Easy to Clean Fruit and vegetable residues on smooth blades are easier to clean than those on serrated blades, just rinse with water. The blade made of stainless steel is more durable and not easy to rust. Flexible Swivel Blade It fits the curved surfaces of apples, potatoes, and pears better during use. And the cutting edge of the blade is designed inward, this allows you to avoid injury to your fingers to a certain extent when you accidentally hold or press. Specifications Color: black, green Material: stainless steel Size: 5.7x3 inch Handle Thickness: 0.5 inch Includes: 2 pcs potato peeler Why Choose Our Potato Peeler? 1. Store - There is a small hole at the end of the handle, which can be hung on a kitchen hook. 2. Dig-eye Design - Use the small triangles on the side of the Y-Peeler to quickly remove potato sprouts, apple spots, etc. 3. Functional - Our peeler does not require much skill to peel the fruit without producing too much pulp. Make kitchen work a lot more easier!
